Alice was pretty sure that not everyone 27, but she didn’t know how to weed out the gatecrashers. Then, her husband Robert 28 an idea. Robert turned to the guests and said, “Will all those from the bride’s side of the family please stand up?” About 20 people stood up as Robert’s 29 was made. Then, he went on to ask, “Now those from the groom’s side?” About 25 people 30 this time. Then he smiled and said, “I’m afraid that all those who are standing would have to leave. This is a birthday party.”

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, what motivated Seton to hunt down Lobo?
options: The importance of the mission and the search for a new topic in his new novel.
The challenge of the task itself and the prospect of a cash reward.
A deep hatred for wolves and a strong desire to restore peace and order.
A hunger for wealth and an ambition to establish a national park.
questions.explanation: 正解：(B)；來源：101-4-四技二專-英文解析.pdf

questions.q: According to the passage, it took longer than Seton had expected to finally capture Lobo because Seton.

had to work all by himself because his partner had been killed by Lobo
fell ill because he couldn’t adapt to the weather in the Currumpaw Valley
had not expected that Lobo was such an astonishingly intelligent adversary
questions.explanation: 正解：(D)；來源：101-4-四技二專-英文解析.pdf

questions.subject: 英文

a sense of pride in his achievement

questions.explanation: 正解：(A)；來源：101-4-四技二專-英文解析.pdf
